title: rainy monsoon fried mediterranean garlic bowl
description: a funky, snappy, monsoon mediterranean dish featuring minced garlic, served in an earthenware bowl.

ingredients.name: minced garlic
ingredients.notes: mildly roasted to bring out the flavor.

ingredients.name: double-fry seasoning (spicy)
ingredients.notes: to give it that extra kick.

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through.
remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
add the basmati rice to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
add the feta cheese, chopped parsley, lemon zest, double-fry seasoning (spicy), and salt to the skillet. stir to combine.
serve the chicken on top of the rice mixture in the earthenware bowl.
garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
